name: bait_and_switch
description: Advertised low price, then pressure for expensive extras
notes: Always confirm final price before service

name: extra_fee_pressure
description: Upselling pressure for 'premium' services or 'special' treatments
notes: Legitimate shops don't pressure for extras

name: menu_upselling
description: Hidden menu items with much higher prices
notes: Ask to see full menu before booking

name: hidden_surcharges
description: Unexpected charges added at payment time
notes: Confirm all fees before service starts

name: unlisted_pricing
description: No prices displayed, quoted verbally only

name: dark_entry
description: Entrance in alley, back street, or poorly lit area

name: unsolicited_offers
description: Aggressive street touts or unsolicited offers
notes: Avoid shops that use street touts

name: no_reception
description: No visible reception area or front desk
